sections.title: Safe start and guard check
sections.content: Before operation, confirm the machine is CARTONER-ST2, close all guard doors, clear the infeed, and verify no active alarm is present.

sections.title: Product guide alignment
sections.content: Adjust only the released guide rail reference marks for the running carton family; stop and ask the line lead if cartons skew or jam repeatedly.

sections.title: Risk control and escalation
sections.content: Keep hands outside guarded transfer areas, do not bypass interlocks, and escalate abnormal noise, vibration, tooling contact, or repeated rejects.
